title: TasteGraph Preference Entry
description: A single structured preference in Mario's TasteGraph model. Consumed by Wilbur and WAI advisors to shape agent behavior according to Mario's stated and verified preferences.

id.description: Unique preference ID in slug format. Convention: {category-abbrev}-{kebab-description}

category.description: Preference category. See tastegraph-spec.md Section 3 for category descriptions.

key.description: Machine-readable preference key within its category. Used for programmatic lookup by advisors.

value.description: The preference value. Type varies: string for descriptive preferences, boolean for on/off flags, object for structured preferences with sub-fields.

confidence.description: stated=user explicitly documented this; inferred=derived from observed behavior, must be verified before use; verified=user confirmed this preference is accurate

source.description: Where this preference was derived from. Examples: 'CLAUDE.md anti-patterns', 'session-20260525-1442', 'feedback_no_permission_asking.md', 'lug-tastegraph-spec-v1 minder_seed_preferences_to_capture'

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this preference was first recorded

last_verified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when Mario last confirmed this preference. Null = never explicitly re-verified after creation.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes. Recommended: capture the rationale or observed context that led to this preference.
